name: Founder's Signature Vol. 1
description: 5 hand-crafted presets from XO_OX's founder — demonstrating coupling, character engines, and the XOmnibus philosophy. Free forever.

presets.name: Coupled Bounce
presets.notes: Week 1 — ONSET + OVERBITE entangled. Rhythm->Blend + Amp->Filter coupling. One-finger trap beat.

presets.name: Belly to Bite
presets.notes: Week 2 — OVERBITE solo. 5-macro demonstration. Foundation bass for all genres.

presets.name: Coral Investigations
presets.notes: Week 3 — OBLONG solo. CuriosityEngine Investigate mode. Behavioral LFO exploration.

presets.name: Thermocline Dispatch
presets.notes: Week 4 — OVERDUB + ODYSSEY entangled. Tape delay + psychedelic drift. Dub atmosphere.

presets.name: Tidal Dialogue
presets.notes: Week 5 — ONSET + ODYSSEY entangled. Amp->Filter + Amp->Pitch coupling. Per-sample emotional interaction.
